section2.description1: Fascinated by the prestigious potential of Traditional Method
section2.description2: we bring the finesse of South Tyrolean

section3.description1: In the beauty of our land, we have always found
section3.description2: the inspiration to enhance its centuries, old winemaking

section4.description1: Discover the authenticity, elegance and surprising aspects
section4.description2: of South Tyrol with the live tours, tastings and events

section1.description1: Kettmeir looks to the future with deep roots. Our manifesto speaks of
section1.description2: our respect for time and the strength of those who dare
section1.description4: when you find the courage to question them.
section1.description5: South Tyrol taught us this, and we have been putting it into practice since 1919.

section2.description1: It is only by looking at the imposing peaks of the Dolomites that we can grasp the nuances of the gentle vineyard-covered slopes around Caldaro.
section2.description2: Only through oenological experimentation, the cornerstone of our Manifesto, can we carry forward the prestige of ancient traditions like the Traditional Method. And make them meaningful for contemporary times as well.
